page_title: GOD'S IN HIS HEAVEN - Neon Genesis Evangelion Anthology Comic
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion anime series. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Movic on 01 July 1996. https://www.amazon.co.jp/%E3%82%A2%E3%83%B3%E3%82%BD%E3%83%AD%E3%82%B8%E3%83%BC/dp/4896012399/ 

Staff

Planner: Katsumi Yasuda
Editors: Mamoru Yokota, Kousei Kimuro, Hiroshi Ishidoya, Makoto Nakamura

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4896012399
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4896012392
